title: To J. Rankine.
content:
I am a keeper of the law
        In some sma' points, altho' not a';
        Some people tell me gin I fa'
            Ae way or ither.
        The breaking of ae point, though sma',
            Breaks a' thegither

        I hae been in for't once or twice,
        And winna say o'er far for thrice,
        Yet never met with that surprise
            That broke my rest,
        But now a rumour's like to rise,
            A whaup's i' the nest.
meaning:
"To J. Rankine." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
